title: triticum vulgare subsp. aestivum
intro: Triticum vulgare subsp. aestivum, commonly known as bread wheat, is a domesticated plant species that belongs to the grass family and is widely cultivated for its edible grains. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation in the body. The health benefits of bread wheat include its ability to support digestive health, lower cholesterol levels, and provide essential nutrients such as fiber, iron, and B vitamins. Herbal preparations of bread wheat, such as wheatgrass juice and wheat germ oil, can be used to support overall health and well-being, making it a valuable addition to a holistic health regimen.
